tasks.name: InferImplicationsOfSentence
tasks.description: Infer unstated but implied facts from a natural language sentence to answer a question.
tasks.makes: answer is consistent with facts stated or implied by statement

tasks.name: AnalyseRPMCell
tasks.description: Construct a frame-based representation of the visual elements and spatial relations in a Raven's Progressive Matrices cell.
tasks.makes: representation captures elements and spatial relations in rpmCell

tasks.name: UnderstandNewsStory
tasks.description: Extract structured facts from an unstructured news story.
tasks.makes: facts capture information provided in story
